summary: iter175 testing complete - All new features working: Milestones (preview/send-today/feed), My Schedule (employee week view with birthday/anniversary/promotion banners), Magic-Link Delegation (mint/resolve/edit with scope enforcement), Lifestyle Prep-Cascade + Claude suggestions. Backend: 26/28 passed (2 skipped - no guests for welcome pack). Frontend: All critical flows verified.

minor.issue: Skipped - no guests in concierge database for testing

seed_data_creation: None - used existing seed data (Priya S. birthday 04-18, Marcus H. hire_date 2021-04-18, Elena R. promotion 2024-04-18)
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter175 adds 4 new backend route files (milestones.py, my_schedule.py, standup_delegation.py, welcome_pack.py) + 2 new endpoints in lifestyle_dashboard.py (prep-cascade, suggest). Frontend adds MySchedule panel (employee schedule with milestone banners), Prep Cascade tab in Lifestyle Command, Claude suggestions in Create Activation tab, and milestone Preview/Send buttons in People Admin. All features verified working. Resend email is MOCKED (dry-run when RESEND_API_KEY not set).

mocked_apis.Resend transactional email: dry-run when RESEND_API_KEY not set - returns status='dry-run' instead of actually sending
